narrative:
Scioto Twp township has 17,139 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.1 percentage points.
